zh.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer是John of Hodnell de Spencer和Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend的兒子，於1432年1月15日出生在英國戴文。他於1458年與Joan Mallet在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1497年8月18日在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer是John of Hodnell de Spencer和Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend的儿子，于1432年1月15日出生在英国戴文。他于1458年与Joan Mallet在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1497年8月18日在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer was born on 15 January 1432, in Devon, England as the son of John of Hodnell de Spencer and Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend. He married Joan Mallet in 1458, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 August 1497, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer est né le 15 janvier 1432, à Devon, Angleterre, fils de John of Hodnell de Spencer et Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend. Il a épousé Joan Mallet en 1458, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 août 1497, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer wurde am 15. Januar 1432 in Devon, England, als Sohn von John of Hodnell de Spencer und Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend geboren. Er hat 1458 in Devon, England Joan Mallet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. August 1497 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer è nato il il 15 gennaio 1432 nel Devon, England come figlio di John of Hodnell de Spencer e Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend. Lui sposato Joan Mallet nel 1458, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 agosto 1497, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencerは1432年1月15日にイギリスデボンでJohn of Hodnell de SpencerとElizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstendの息子として生まれた。1458年にイギリスデボンでJoan Malletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1497年8月18日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer(은)는 1432년 1월 15일 영국 데폰에서 John of Hodnell de Spencer(와)과 Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1458년 영국 데폰에서 Joan Mallet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1497년 8월 18일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.15 January 1432–18 August 1497: 15 de janeiro de 1432–18 de agosto de 1497
pt.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer nasceu em 15 de janeiro de 1432, em Devon, Inglaterra filho de John of Hodnell de Spencer e Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend. Ele casou-se com Joan Mallet em 1458, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1497, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer родился 15 января 1432 г. в местности девон, Англия. Его родителей звали John of Hodnell de Spencer и Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Mallet в 1458 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 августа 1497 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.15 January 1432–18 August 1497: 15 de enero de 1432–18 de agosto de 1497
es.lifeSummary: Edmund Spencer nació el 15 de enero de 1432, en Devon, Inglaterra como hijo de John of Hodnell de Spencer y Elizabeth Joan dau. of David Spencer de Warstend. Se casó con Joan Mallet en 1458, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1497, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
